name: Hot and Sour Soup
recipeIngredient: 4 each Chicken breasts, skin and bone removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into 1/8 inch slices.
2. Stir the chicken slices with 1 tablespoon soy sauce in a bowl.
3. Cook the chicken in oil in a Dutch oven until tender (about 3 minutes).
4. Remove the chicken and add the remaining soy sauce to the pan along with the next seven ingredients.
5. Heat to boiling, stirring frequently.
6. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
7. Add the chicken and tofu, then bring to a boil over medium heat.
8. Stir in the cornstarch mixture (1/3 cup water) until slightly thickened and smooth.
9. Beat the eggs in a small bowl and slowly pour into the soup, stirring gently until set.
10. Sprinkle with green onion.
